does_not_prove: A PASS in this audit does not create new live evidence; it validates existing receipts.
The strict Chatterbox-from-live-STT gate fails unless browser/WebRTC RealtimeSTT transcript and Chatterbox render both pass.
proves: Each requested Horus/Embry live-loop item is deterministically classified PASS or FAIL from local receipt fields.

evidence.realtimestt_transcript: Form a smirk station, loop, bank check on the Z-sand, but...

evidence.asr_text: When should C7, 8 software, firmware, and information integrity auditing capability for significant events be used in satellite operations.

evidence.continuous_listener_transcript: Form a smirk station, loop, bank check on the Z-sand, but...
evidence.lineage_rule: PASS requires one continuous-loop receipt with live STT transcript plus Tau/Chatterbox render artifacts.

evidence.proof_type: UI DOM/text/audio-src proof, not full browser microphone loop.
